violations.text: Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing bay at the bar. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

Utensils (strainers) in the bar area are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the small freezer (for glasses) has an accumulation of ice. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025
Fan guards in the walk-in refrigerator have an accumulation of debris. PIC infprmed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025
